evidence: Read MANDATORY OVERRIDE in docs/coordination/CODEX_LIVE_PITCH_AUTOMATION.md.
Read docs/coordination/CLAUDE_PITCH_AUTOMATION_REVIEW.json with decision APPROVE_SPEC_ONLY.
Read docs/coordination/CODEX_PEER_PITCH_AUTOMATION_REVIEW.json with decision APPROVE_SPEC_ONLY.
Confirmed package.json has no bin field; npx vibeshield install remains ROADMAP.
Confirmed src/scan.ts only maps known tools and guard/approval-gate presence; readiness checks 5-12 remain ROADMAP/static checklist.
Confirmed .github/workflows/vibeshield.yml exists but is hand-committed, not generated by a CLI.
No daemon started and no npm, tsx, or node src/* command run.
No measured rehearsal was run in SPEC_ONLY mode, so three_minute_timing_pass and overall_pass remain false.
Added docs/pitch-v2/EVIDENCE_BINDING_MATRIX.md to bind each pitch action to endpoint evidence, artifact evidence, or ROADMAP.
Added tests/pitch-spec/evidence_binding_acceptance.json to make truth badges, endpoint ownership, timing, and non-duplication reviewer-checkable.
Added docs/pitch-v2/CLAIM_STATUS_LEDGER.md to label major product, legal, platform, and adoption claims as LIVE, RECORDED REAL RUN, LOCAL FALLBACK, ROADMAP, or DO NOT CLAIM.
Added tests/pitch-spec/claim_status_acceptance.json to make claim-status review explicit.
Added docs/pitch-v2/MORNING_GO_NO_GO_RUNBOOK.md so the presenter must choose LIVE, RECORDED REAL RUN, LOCAL FALLBACK, or ROADMAP before rehearsal.
Added tests/pitch-spec/morning_go_no_go_acceptance.json to make route selection, fallback language, hard no-go conditions, and timing gates reviewer-checkable.
Added docs/pitch-v2/DEMO_EVIDENCE_PACKET_TEMPLATE.md to require route, identifiers, truth-badge evidence, downgrade labels, and measured timing fields before live claims.
Added tests/pitch-spec/demo_evidence_packet_acceptance.json to make evidence packet requirements reviewer-checkable.
Added docs/pitch-v2/PRESENTER_COMMAND_CARD.md to give the presenter one-page route, timing, fallback, and do-not-say cues.
Added tests/pitch-spec/presenter_command_card_acceptance.json to make the cue card reviewer-checkable.
Added docs/pitch-v2/SPONSOR_INTEGRATION_TRUTH_TABLE.md to keep Arize, ArmorIQ, Token Company, browser extension, CI, and legal/platform integration claims evidence-bound.
Added tests/pitch-spec/sponsor_integration_truth_acceptance.json to make sponsor/integration truth checks reviewer-checkable.
Added docs/pitch-v2/PITCH_V2_START_HERE.md to give presenter, integration owner, and reviewer ordered read paths.
Added tests/pitch-spec/pitch_v2_start_here_acceptance.json to make the index reviewer-checkable.
Added docs/pitch-v2/INTEGRATION_OWNER_REVIEW_CHECKLIST.md to separate docs/spec merge review from runtime implementation and live-claim upgrades.
Added tests/pitch-spec/integration_owner_review_acceptance.json to make integration-owner review gates reviewer-checkable.
Added tests/pitch-spec/demo_evidence_packet.schema.json as a SPEC_ONLY structural schema for a future filled evidence packet.
Added docs/pitch-v2/DEMO_EVIDENCE_PACKET_SCHEMA.md and tests/pitch-spec/demo_evidence_packet_schema_acceptance.json to document and review the schema without claiming live evidence.
Added tests/pitch-spec/demo_evidence_packet.example.json as a TODO/NOT_CONFIGURED placeholder shape, not evidence.
